hero.description: Lavie's Home is an English language center in Go Vap, helping children, teenagers and adults develop their English through Cambridge, IELTS and English Communication courses in a warm, inspiring and student-centered learning environment.

about.description: Lavie's Home is an English language center in Go Vap dedicated to creating a warm, inspiring and student-centered learning environment. We believe every learner can grow with confidence through personalized learning paths and the continuous support of passionate teachers.

whyChoose.description: Lavie's Home provides a warm learning environment, structured English programs and dedicated teachers to help students develop confidence, communication skills and long-term academic success.

items.title: Small Class Sizes
items.description: Teachers closely support every learner through personalized guidance and continuous feedback.

items.title: Passionate Teachers
items.description: Experienced teachers specializing in Cambridge, IELTS and English Communication.

items.title: Clear Learning Path
items.description: Well-structured courses designed for different ages and learning goals.

items.title: Inspiring Environment
items.description: Students are encouraged to communicate confidently while enjoying every lesson.

courses.description: From Cambridge courses for children and IELTS preparation to English Communication for adults, Lavie's Home offers learning pathways tailored to every student's goals.

items.title: Cambridge English
items.description: A structured Cambridge pathway from Starters to PET, building a strong English foundation.

items.title: IELTS Preparation
items.description: Master all four English skills with proven learning strategies to confidently achieve your target IELTS band score.

items.title: English Communication
items.description: Develop natural communication skills and confidence in real-life English conversations.

gallery.description: Discover memorable moments from our classrooms, activities and special events. Every photo reflects our students' growth, confidence and joy in learning English.

section.description: Every teacher at Lavie's Home creates an inspiring learning environment where students build confidence and develop comprehensive English skills.

founder.name: Teacher Tom
founder.description: With more than 15 years of experience teaching English and preparing students for Cambridge examinations, he is dedicated to creating an inspiring learning environment where every learner gains confidence in using English in real-life situations.

section.description: Genuine feedback from parents and students stands as the clearest testament to the quality of education at Lavie's Home.

list.name: Nguyen Thi Hoa
list.review: My child used to be quite shy when communicating in English. After a few months at Lavie's Home, they became much more confident.

list.name: Ta Vu Ngoc Hieu
list.review: The teachers are extremely dedicated and regularly update us on our child's progress. The learning path is clear, and the teaching methodology is highly accessible.

list.name: Vu Vu
list.review: What I love most is the warm, home-like environment. I'm no longer afraid of learning English; instead, I proactively practice every single day.

title.highlight: on the Journey to Master English.

section.description: If you are looking for an inspiring, friendly, and high-quality English learning environment, get in touch with Lavie's Home for the most suitable learning path.
